answer:
We perform partial fraction decomposition on  
\[
F(s) = \frac{2s^2 - 4}{(s-2)(s+1)(s-3)}.
\]  
Solving gives  
\[
F(s) = \frac{-4/3}{s-2} - \frac{1/6}{s+1} + \frac{7/2}{s-3}.
\]  
Taking the inverse Laplace transform yields  
\[
f(t) = -\frac{4}{3}e^{2t} - \frac{1}{6}e^{-t} + \frac{7}{2}e^{3t},
\]  
which matches option F.

\boxed{F}
